summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Educator Onboarding System with 8 steps. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The onboarding flow includes Welcome Video, Profile, Personal Details, Bank Details, Contract, Training+Quiz, Curriculum+Assessment, and Complete steps.

issues: YouTube video is placeholder (Rick Astley) - as mentioned in requirements, this is MOCKED

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/educator/onboarding/content - Returns training videos, curriculum videos, welcome video, contract text (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/educator/onboarding/{educator_id} - Returns onboarding progress for educator (200 OK)
Backend: PATCH /api/educator/onboarding/{educator_id} - Updates onboarding data (bio, profile, etc.) (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/educator/onboarding/{educator_id}/quiz - Returns 5 quiz questions without correct answers (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/educator/onboarding/{educator_id}/assessment - Returns 3 assessment questions (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/educator/onboarding/{educator_id}/submit-quiz - Pass with 100% score (all correct answers)
Backend: POST /api/educator/onboarding/{educator_id}/submit-quiz - Fail with 0% score (70% threshold enforced)
Backend: POST /api/educator/onboarding/{educator_id}/submit-assessment - Pass with 100% score
Backend: POST /api/admin/educators/direct-onboard - Creates educator with onboarded status and onboarding record (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/admin/educators/onboarding-progress - Returns all onboarding data for admin (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/educator/onboarding/{educator_id}/complete-step - Advances progress to next step (200 OK)
Frontend: Educator login redirects onboarded educators to /educator-onboarding
Frontend: Onboarding page shows all 8 steps in sidebar (Welcome, Profile, Personal Details, Bank Details, Contract, Training, Curriculum, Complete)
Frontend: Progress bar shows percentage completion (25% for 2/8 steps)
Frontend: Welcome step shows YouTube video embed and 'I've Watched the Video - Continue' button
Frontend: Profile step has photo upload area and bio textarea with character counter (minimum 50)
Frontend: Personal Details step has T-shirt size buttons (XS-XXL), address fields, emergency contact, Aadhar/PAN fields
Frontend: Admin Educators page has 'Direct Onboard' button (red)
Frontend: Admin Educators page has 'Onboarding Progress' button (green outline)
Frontend: Direct Onboard modal has Name, Email, Phone, Skills, City, Experience fields
Frontend: Onboarding Progress modal shows all educators with progress percentage and step completion
updated_files: /app/tests/test_educator_onboarding.py - Created comprehensive test file for Educator Onboarding System
seed_data_creation: Test educator created via Direct Onboard API was archived after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Educator Onboarding System fully tested and working: 1) 8-step onboarding flow: Welcome Video, Profile (photo+bio), Personal Details (T-shirt, address, emergency contact, Aadhar/PAN), Bank Details, Contract Signing, Training Videos+Quiz (5 questions, 70% pass), Curriculum Training+Assessment (3 questions), Complete (ID Card+Certificate). 2) Quiz/Assessment APIs calculate score and enforce 70% pass threshold. 3) Admin can Direct Onboard educators (skips selection process) and view Onboarding Progress for all educators. 4) Educators with 'onboarded' status are redirected to /educator-onboarding if onboarding not completed.

mocked_apis_list: Welcome video uses placeholder YouTube embed (Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up)
mocked_apis.note: Training and curriculum videos are also placeholder YouTube embeds. In production, these should be replaced with actual OLL training content.

Onboarding_Content_API.details: GET /api/educator/onboarding/content returns training_videos (3), curriculum_videos (2), welcome_video, and contract_text

Onboarding_Progress_API.details: GET /api/educator/onboarding/{id} returns onboarding record with current_step, completed_steps, status. Creates new record if not exists.

Update_Progress_API.details: PATCH /api/educator/onboarding/{id} updates any onboarding field (bio, profile_photo, address, etc.)

Complete_Step_API.details: POST /api/educator/onboarding/{id}/complete-step marks step as completed and advances to next step

Quiz_Submission.details: POST /api/educator/onboarding/{id}/submit-quiz calculates score from 5 questions, requires 70% to pass. Stores attempt history.

Assessment_Submission.details: POST /api/educator/onboarding/{id}/submit-assessment calculates score from 3 questions, requires 70% to pass.

Direct_Onboard_API.details: POST /api/admin/educators/direct-onboard creates educator with status='onboarded' and creates onboarding record

Admin_Onboarding_Progress.details: GET /api/admin/educators/onboarding-progress returns all onboarded educators with their onboarding progress

Frontend_Onboarding_Page.details: 8-step wizard with sidebar navigation, progress bar, step-specific forms. Completed steps show green checkmarks.

Admin_Direct_Onboard_Button.details: Red 'Direct Onboard' button on Admin Educators page opens modal with educator form

Admin_Onboarding_Progress_Button.details: Green 'Onboarding Progress' button shows modal with all educators and their progress percentages

onboarding_steps_verified: Step 1: Welcome - Video embed + Continue button
Step 2: Profile - Photo upload + Bio textarea (min 50 chars)
Step 3: Personal Details - T-shirt size, Address, Emergency Contact, Aadhar/PAN
Step 4: Bank Details - Bank name, Account holder, Account number, IFSC, Document upload
Step 5: Contract - Contract text display + Digital signature + Accept checkbox
Step 6: Training - 3 training videos + 5-question quiz (70% pass)
Step 7: Curriculum - 2 curriculum videos + 3-question assessment (70% pass)
Step 8: Complete - Generate Certificate + ID Card buttons
